title: Setting Up Monday.com
excerpt:
Hi There, 
I am looking for someone to help our small business set up monday.com, we would need help from start to finish and teach us how to use the site properly. At this point we’re using it for client project managem…

posts.author: YPO (Lisa Kaplan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi There,

I am looking for someone to help our small business set up monday.com, we would need help from start to finish and teach us how to use the site properly. At this point we’re using it for client project management and employee onboarding/directory, but we aren’t using it to it’s full potential.

We are a small residential organization company and are happy to pay for someone’s time.

If you are interested please contact me via email or phone.

Many thanks,

Lisa

Email - info@yourproorganizer.com
Phone - 1 (954) 406-6002

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @YPO

As a Platinum Partner and a multi award-winning team, we’re best positioned to help you at Upstream Tech.

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @YPO

Welcome to the monday community !

I am sure our team at thespelas.com can help you out! At thespelas.com we’re an Official USA Channel and Advanced Services Delivery monday partner with over 6 years of experience on the platform and extensive experience in designing and implementing customized solutions that are tailored to each business’ goals.

We have a wealth of experience in creating specialized solutions and have worked with similar companies in your field in the past, and of course we are fully versed in project management and HR related business and monday best practices.

The way we usually approach each potential partner is by setting up an initial Free Consulting Session with us so we can better discuss your vision and requirements!

Please do set up a meeting with us right here.

Alternatively, if none of the available time slots work out for you, please contact us at info@thespelas.com so we can do our best to accommodate you.

I sincerely hope our services can be of use to you!

Best Regards,
Giannis Koukounas, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @YPO

Thanks for reaching out to the community! The success of a modern enterprise hinges on project productivity. monday.com allows you to build automated workflows that minimize manual tasks, reduce errors, and boost overall productivity. This makes the tool a coveted choice for workflow management. With monday.com work management, you can easily create cross-departmental workflows, allowing your teams to focus on attaining efficient work processes, from planning to execution, and achieve shared goals at scale.

If you’re seeking help to maximize the potential of this tool, hiring monday.com consultants is the right choice. This way, you can get personalized guidance on working & maximizing monday.com based on your requirements.
